key.name: auto-copy
key.description: Automatically copy detected tokens and PINs to the clipboard

key.name: show-confirmation
key.description: Show a notification when a token is copied to the clipboard

key.name: pin-min-digits
key.description: Minimum number of digits for a PIN or numeric code

key.name: pin-max-digits
key.description: Maximum number of digits for a PIN or numeric code

key.name: token-keywords
key.default: ["code","codice","token","otp","pin","verif","verifica","auth","2fa","two-factor","two factor","one-time","one time","temporary","temporaneo","temporanea","access code","security code","codice di sicurezza","codice di verifica","password","one-time password","one time password","totp"]
key.description: Keywords that indicate a token or PIN is present in a notification. Each word or phrase is matched case-insensitively against notification text.

key.name: token-min-length
key.description: Minimum character length for alphanumeric token fallback

key.name: token-max-length
key.description: Maximum character length for alphanumeric token fallback

key.name: last-copied-token
key.description: Last copied token (used to prevent duplicate copies)
